title: Operator assigns and closes an assistant action
steps: Review pending assistant action queue items with owner, due date, priority, and object link.
Approve an action, then mark it Done with a decision note.
expected: Action status transitions are durable and keep decision notes.
Stale actions are highlighted when dueAt is past and status is still open.
Object links remain available for returning to the source workflow.

title: Supervisor creates a playbook template and runs it
steps: Create a playbook template from the Work engine page.
Start a run from the saved template.
Complete each step from Active playbook runs.
expected: Template persists with steps, priority, and SLA hours.
Run receives dueAt from the SLA and tracks step state durably.
Run becomes COMPLETED when all steps are done or skipped.

title: Operator archives stale assistant memory
steps: Pick an old or low-value assistant audit event.
Archive the memory row with cleanup reason.
expected: Archived memory is removed from active work-engine summaries.
Archive timestamp and reason persist on AssistantAuditEvent.
Underlying business object data is not deleted.
